### ⚠️ Security

**If you are upgrading from a deployment predating the alice-installer tool (i.e., you deployed directly from `docker-compose.yml` before it was templated), you MUST rotate `POSTGRES_PASSWORD`.**

The old `docker-compose.yml` contained a hardcoded `POSTGRES_PASSWORD` value that may be in your git history. Follow the rotation procedure in `RUNBOOK.md § Password rotation` before upgrading.

---

### Installation

**amd64 (x86-64)**:

```sh
curl -LO https://github.com/Jcaltamar/alice-installer/releases/download/{{.Tag}}/alice-installer_{{.Version}}_linux_amd64.tar.gz
tar -xzf alice-installer_{{.Version}}_linux_amd64.tar.gz
sha256sum -c checksums.txt
chmod +x alice-installer
./alice-installer
```

**arm64 (Raspberry Pi 4/5, AWS Graviton, etc.)**:

```sh
curl -LO https://github.com/Jcaltamar/alice-installer/releases/download/{{.Tag}}/alice-installer_{{.Version}}_linux_arm64.tar.gz
tar -xzf alice-installer_{{.Version}}_linux_arm64.tar.gz
sha256sum -c checksums.txt
chmod +x alice-installer
./alice-installer
```

### Binaries

| Platform       | File                                              |
|----------------|---------------------------------------------------|
| linux / amd64  | `alice-installer_{{.Version}}_linux_amd64.tar.gz` |
| linux / arm64  | `alice-installer_{{.Version}}_linux_arm64.tar.gz` |

Verify integrity against `checksums.txt` (SHA-256).
